contentPattern.structure: N repeating items, each logo image + company name heading + 'View Profile' CTA link

suitableFor: directory / listing grids of entities (providers, partners) with a logo, name and a single 'view'/'profile' CTA
JS/API-extensible card grids where each item is a logo + title + link
notSuitableFor: image-rich cards with long descriptions (use cards-rituals)
